text: o presbyteros gaiō tō agapētō on egō agapō en alētheia
agapēte peri pantōn euchomai se euodousthai kai ygiainein kathōs euodoutai sou ē psychē
echarēn gar lian erchomenōn adelphōn kai martyrountōn sou tē alētheia kathōs sy en alētheia peripateis
meizoteran toutōn ouk echō charan ina akouō ta ema tekna en alētheia peripatounta
agapēte piston poieis o ean ergasē eis tous adelphous kai eis tous xenous
oi emartyrēsan sou tē agapē enōpion ekklēsias ous kalōs poiēseis propempsas axiōs tou theou
yper gar tou onomatos autou exēlthon mēden lambanontes apo tōn ethnōn
ēmeis oun opheilomen apolambanein tous toioutous ina synergoi ginōmetha tē alētheia
egrapsa tē ekklēsia all o philoprōteuōn autōn diotrephēs ouk epidechetai ēmas

dia touto ean elthō ypomnēsō autou ta erga a poiei logois ponērois phlyarōn ēmas kai mē arkoumenos epi toutois oute autos epidechetai tous adelphous kai tous boulomenous kōlyei kai ek tēs ekklēsias ekballei
agapēte mē mimou to kakon alla to agathon o agathopoiōn ek tou theou estin o de kakopoiōn ouch eōraken ton theon
dēmētriō memartyrētai ypo pantōn kai yp autēs tēs alētheias kai ēmeis de martyroumen kai oidate oti ē martyria ēmōn alēthēs estin
polla eichon graphein all ou thelō dia melanos kai kalamou soi grapsai
elpizō de eutheōs idein se kai stoma pros stoma lalēsomen eirēnē soi aspazontai se oi philoi aspazou tous philous kat onoma
